response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a director-level IC with 15+ years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Candidate has roughly 13-14 years of post-degree professional experience, no advanced degree, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, and only recent, light exposure to AI-agent tooling. The profile does not match a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks director-level IC scope; career sits at senior/staff engineer level
Experience and credentials fall short of 15 years plus preferred advanced AI degree
